chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2204 of 2020 Brookes Pharma (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.10357/20 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 11.10.2024 Mr. Sarmad Hani for petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- Mr. Sarmad Hani, learned counsel appearing for the petitioner, has filed a statement along with copy of a notification and submits that in view of fixation of MRP, the petitioner does not wish to proceed with this matter. The statement is taken on record and the petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
